_comment: Copy this file to admin.credentials.json and put YOUR identity in it. admin.credentials.json is git-ignored and must never be committed. Admin access is granted ONLY by matching an authenticated user against this allowlist - it can never be requested at signup or set through the API. If both lists are empty, nobody is an admin.
_note_hosted_deploys: A git-ignored file does not exist on Render. For hosted deploys set the ADMIN_EMAILS and/or ADMIN_FIREBASE_UIDS environment variables instead (comma-separated). Both sources are merged. These are backend-only - never expose them to the frontend, and never prefix them with REACT_APP_.
